title: Hard rename fab init → fab install (file/symbol/citty-name/i18n-keys/snapshots/action_hints/docs)
scope: packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts (rename) + index.ts + tests + i18n locales + snapshots + server action_hints + docs
description: Hard rename the install command from `init` to `install` with NO alias — citty emits 'unknown command' on legacy invocation per user-confirmed hard-cut. This touches: file rename init.ts→install.ts, citty meta.name, all initCommand→installCommand symbol renames, dispatch table at commands/index.ts, test file renames, snapshot regeneration (cli-surface.test.ts.snap + i18n.test.ts.snap), ~30+ cli.init.* i18n keys in en.ts + zh.ts → cli.install.*, eight doctor/meta-reader/api/scan action_hint strings, README/docs/test-seed updates.

files.change: git mv to packages/cli/src/commands/install.ts. Within the file: rename exported symbol `initCommand` → `installCommand`. Change citty `meta.name` from 'init' to 'install'. Update meta.description text to reflect 'install' verb. Update all internal i18n key references from t('cli.init.*') to t('cli.install.*'). Update log strings that contain 'Detected and fixated knowledge_language' to use the new fabric_language naming (cross-cutting with TASK-003).
Replace `init: () => import('./init.js').then((m) => m.default)` with `install: () => import('./install.js').then((m) => m.default)`. NO alias entry for 'init' (hard cut).
Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install' in the description string.
Replace 'fabric init via the bootstrap stage' with 'fabric install via the bootstrap stage'.
Replace 'fab init' references with 'fab install' so 'fab uninstall is the inverse of fab install' reads correctly.

git mv to install.test.ts. Update all imports from '../src/commands/init.ts' → '../src/commands/install.ts' and all initCommand → installCommand references. Update test-name strings containing 'init' to 'install' where the command name is being asserted.
git mv to install-cli-surface.test.ts. Update dynamic imports at L68/L94/L139 and initCommand.run calls at L75/L101/L116/L151 to use the new file path + symbol.

files.target: L13 import + L78 registration + L96 meta read + L102 names assertion + L109 flags read
files.change: Update import to installCommand from '../src/commands/install.ts'. Update names assertion from ['doctor','init','scan','serve','uninstall'] to ['doctor','install','scan','serve','uninstall']. Update all internal references.

files.target: L61 import + L63 run call + L102 meta read
files.change: Rename initCommand → installCommand and update file path import.

Delete the obsolete 'command init surface' snapshot block; run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -u` to regenerate. Verify new snapshot key is 'command install surface' and contains name:'install' instead of name:'init'.

After renaming cli.init.* to cli.install.* in en.ts + zh.ts (see below), regenerate snapshot with `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -u`. Verify 'init' property key disappears and 'install' appears in both en + zh objects.

Rename every cli.init.* key prefix to cli.install.* (description, args.target/debug/force/yes/plan/reapply/no-bootstrap/no-mcp/no-hooks/interactive, mcp.install, wizard.*, stages.*). Approximately 30+ key renames. Update the English value strings that say 'Initialize Fabric' → 'Install Fabric' where appropriate (verb change is user-visible).
Same key-prefix rename as en.ts. Update value strings: '初始化 Fabric' → '安装 Fabric' (or appropriate zh-CN verb for 'install'; align with the new English value).

Replace every user-facing action_hint string containing 'fab init' or 'fabric init' with the install verb. Pay particular attention to L1790 'Run fabric init to generate the AGENTS.md…' → 'Run fabric install to generate the AGENTS.md…', L1844/L1848 forensic_invalid hints, L1942 mcp config remediation hint.
'Run `fab init` to scaffold…' → 'Run `fab install` to scaffold…'
'L0: Run `fab init` to scaffold…' → 'L0: Run `fab install` to scaffold…'

files.target: L10 + L14 + L22 + L23 + L28-L36 — five+ references
files.change: Rename init command surface contract enumeration to 'install' command. Update flag matrix header. Update I2/I3/I4/I10 integration-test contract names. Update L29 'init --reapply idempotent' → 'install --reapply idempotent'.
Update CLI command set enumeration from 'init / scan / doctor / serve' → 'install / scan / doctor / serve'.
Update the 4-public-commands enumeration to use 'install' instead of 'init'.

files.target: L3 + L12 + L41 + L181 + L191 + L252 — six references
files.change: Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install' throughout. Consider renaming the file to install.md (low priority — the URL is internal-only).

files.target: L36 + L43-L46 + L61 + L68 + L119 — onboarding doc
files.change: Replace 'fabric init' → 'fabric install' across the four-row flag table and surrounding prose. Update zh-CN user-quote at L68 ('我刚运行了 fabric init') → '我刚运行了 fabric install'.

files.target: L56 + L62 + L121 + L141 + L149 + L185 + L195 — seven references
files.change: Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install' throughout.

files.target: L241 'Drives fabric init baseline template language…'
files.change: Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install'.
Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install'.
Replace with 'fab install --help'.
Replace 'fabric init 会把…' with 'fabric install 会把…'.
Replace 'fabric init' code block content with 'fabric install'.
Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install'.

Replace command enumeration to include 'fabric install'; update install code block; update docs link 'Initialization — what fabric install does'.
Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install'.
Replace 'fabric init' with 'fabric install' in release validation playbook.

Add a new rc.12 entry announcing: (1) fab init → fab install hard rename, (2) knowledge_language → fabric_language schema rename with new zh-CN-hybrid value, (3) SessionStart revision_hash gate removal, (4) POINTER_LINE → managed-section migration. Past entries' 'fab init' references are left untouched for historical accuracy.
Replace 'consumed by fabric init' with 'consumed by fabric install'.
Replace 'installed by fab init' with 'installed by fab install'.
Replace 'fab init against an empty target' with 'fab install against an empty target'.

implementation: Use `git mv` for the file renames (init.ts→install.ts, init.test.ts→install.test.ts, init-cli-surface.test.ts→install-cli-surface.test.ts) to preserve git history
Inside renamed install.ts: change citty meta.name to 'install', export renamed symbol installCommand, update internal t() key references (foreshadowing the en.ts/zh.ts rename below)
Update commands/index.ts allCommands map: replace 'init' key with 'install' and update dynamic import path. Verify no alias entry is added (hard cut per user)
Update packages/cli/src/index.ts meta.description text (covered by cli-surface snapshot)
Find-and-replace cli.init.* → cli.install.* in en.ts (~30 keys) and zh.ts (~30 keys); also update value strings (e.g. 'Initialize Fabric' → 'Install Fabric', '初始化 Fabric' → '安装 Fabric')
Update all test imports + symbol references in cli-surface.test.ts, i18n.test.ts, install-cli-surface.test.ts. Update names equality assertion in cli-surface.test.ts L102
Update doctor.ts (~6 sites), meta-reader.ts (L18), server/api/scan.ts (L160) action_hint strings

Update all docs/*.md and root-level *.md references (mechanical find-replace of 'fab init' → 'fab install' and 'fabric init' → 'fabric install'); add a new rc.12 CHANGELOG entry but leave historical entries untouched
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -u` to regenerate cli-surface.test.ts.snap + i18n.test.ts.snap; verify diffs are limited to expected init→install replacements
Run full test suite: `pnpm test`; verify exit 0
Manually run `fab install --help` and `fab install --plan` to smoke-test the new command name end-to-end
Smoke test: invoke `fab init` and verify citty emits 'unknown command' (proves hard cut)

reference.pattern: citty command rename pattern: file rename + symbol rename + meta.name update + dispatch-table key update + snapshot regen. Note that meta.name is the citty-internal name used by --help; the dispatch-table key is what the user types.
reference.examples: rc.9 fab uninstall introduction is the closest mirror — uninstall.ts + uninstall.test.ts + cli-surface snapshot all moved in lockstep. Replay that pattern.

criteria: Grep for 'fab init' (and 'fabric init', and 'initCommand') across packages/cli/src + packages/server/src + docs/ + root *.md returns zero results (CHANGELOG historical entries excepted)
`fab install --help` succeeds and outputs help text matching the regenerated cli-surface snapshot
`fab init` exits with citty 'unknown command' (proves hard cut)
cli-surface.test.ts.snap contains 'command install surface' (not 'command init surface') and name:'install' (not name:'init')
i18n.test.ts.snap contains 'install' object property (not 'init') in both en and zh locale objects
en.ts + zh.ts have ~30 cli.install.* keys and ZERO cli.init.* keys

rationale.chosen_approach: Hard cut with no alias and no deprecation message — user explicitly confirmed in grilling. Mechanical find-replace strategy with `git mv` to preserve history. Snapshot regeneration via `pnpm test -u` (manual hand-edit would be error-prone given snapshot size).
alternatives_considered: Hidden citty alias `init: installCommand` (rejected: user hard-cut)
Deprecation message that prints to stderr and exits 1 (rejected: user hard-cut)
Soft rename — keep init.ts as a re-export shim of install.ts (rejected: clean-slate)
rationale.tradeoffs: Pre-existing copy-pasted command lines in tutorials/blog posts will break. Mitigated by clear CHANGELOG entry and the citty 'unknown command' message including the available command list.

manual_checks: Run `fab install --help`; verify help text shows 'install' as command name and lists all flags correctly
Run `fab install --target /tmp/test-fabric --yes`; verify install completes successfully
Run `fab init`; verify citty emits 'unknown command' with suggestion list
Confirm regenerated snapshots are deterministic by running `pnpm test` twice and verifying no diff
success_metrics: Zero 'fab init' / 'fabric init' / 'initCommand' references in source/docs (CHANGELOG history excepted)
Both snapshots regenerated and committed; CI cli-surface drift gate passes
unit: Existing init.test.ts (renamed) tests continue passing as install.test.ts
integration: i18n.test.ts passes with new install keys
